title: Bitcoin forecasted to drop to $59,000 amid geopolitical tensions: Kalshi
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Ongoing geopolitical tensions and macroeconomic uncertainty have led to increased risk aversion in crypto assets. Kalshi, a regulated U.S. prediction market, fo
excerpt: Ongoing geopolitical tensions and macroeconomic uncertainty have led to increased risk aversion in crypto assets. Kalshi, a regulated U.S. prediction market, forecasts Bitcoin to drop to $59,000 within the year. This prediction reflects heightened market volatility and risk aversion.

content.introduction: Ongoing geopolitical tensions and macroeconomic uncertainty have led to increased risk aversion in crypto assets. Kalshi, a regulated U.S. prediction market, forecasts Bitcoin to drop to $59,000 within the year. This prediction reflects heightened market volatility and risk aversion.
body: Whale Insider (@WhaleInsider). 509 likes 123 replies. JUST IN: $BTC forecasted to go as low as $59000 this year, per Kalshi traders.
Kalshi's traders forecast Bitcoin will crash to $60000 this year, up from an all-time low of $45000.
Kalshi (@Kalshi). 451 replies. BREAKING: Our traders forecast Bitcoin to reach a low of $59000.
keyTakeaways: Ongoing geopolitical tensions and macroeconomic uncertainty have led to increased risk aversion in crypto assets. Kalshi
Kalshi's traders forecast Bitcoin will crash to $60000 this year, up from an all-time low of $45000.
